title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese identifies four rules for effectively prompting Claude Code by analyzing how Anthropic engineers actually use it: prompt skills not the model directly, recognize skills as distinct from prompts, build composable rather than custom skills, and leverage session-based learning. The video emphasizes patterns like embedding scripts and controlling invocation scope.
